category_sources: source_facts.description says it converts XML RFC7749 to ASCII or HTML; official GitHub README describes generating RFCs and IETF drafts from XML.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is xml2rfc; official GitHub repository is named ietf-tools/xml2rfc.
docs_sources: Official xml2rfc documentation is published at ietf-tools.github.io/xml2rfc; official repository README contains installation and usage docs.
repo_sources: Official GitHub repository is ietf-tools/xml2rfc and its README describes the xml2rfc tool.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies RFC XML conversion; official README describes IETF drafts/RFC generation and command-line usage.
